data.html_notes: Implement what did with ✓ Investigate rumble prod ERR_WALLET_TRANSFER_RPC_FAIL (RPC client closed) requiring data-shard restarts in wdk-ork-wrk and rumble-ork-wrk When a rant is sent through the wallet, the transaction completes on-chain and the recipient receives the funds, but nothing shows up in the chat. Seen on both prod and staging. Reported by Mariia in Slack during mobile testing. Examples (all confirmed, nothing displayed in chat): Prod - 0x1de8c852f240aE0a90ae6BeD9d32DF1AFd9C5cDE | 0.045 scudos ($0.20) | Jun 4, 16:04 https://etherscan.io/tx/0x73717270150ab968f5e909c5f2a4f93832b421cf46ffec4d21075ceb605ccaa5 - 0x1de8c852f240aE0a90ae6BeD9d32DF1AFd9C5cDE | 0.3 USDt ($0.30) | Jun 4, 16:09 https://plasmascan.to/tx/0xa1c7498d44b98970871ac5e437a64820938b5b5ad8ca3a32a52d23df6a64d7fe Staging - 0x5430Ba7a62979b84B1894638c41776Ec7DC2EfE8 | 0.227 scudos ($1.00) | Jun 5, 09:17 https://etherscan.io/tx/0x424b06075da787533c5fad5c833b6f9608c13859c70318e1c89c7ee9fc30b027 Need to figure out why these rants are not appearing in the chat. Slack ref: https://tether-to.slack.com/archives/C094R63HQ64/p1780603661792139
data.name: Implement Ork RPC Fix for Bug: Completed rant transactions not showing in chat
data.notes:
Implement what did with https://app.asana.com/0/search?q=WDK-1515&searched_type=task&child=1215216504545662&f=true in wdk-ork-wrk and rumble-ork-wrk

When a rant is sent through the wallet, the transaction completes on-chain and the recipient receives the funds, but nothing shows up in the chat. Seen on both prod and staging.

Reported by Mariia in Slack during mobile testing.

Examples (all confirmed, nothing displayed in chat):

Prod
- 0x1de8c852f240aE0a90ae6BeD9d32DF1AFd9C5cDE | 0.045 scudos ($0.20) | Jun 4, 16:04
  https://etherscan.io/tx/0x73717270150ab968f5e909c5f2a4f93832b421cf46ffec4d21075ceb605ccaa5
- 0x1de8c852f240aE0a90ae6BeD9d32DF1AFd9C5cDE | 0.3 USDt ($0.30) | Jun 4, 16:09
  https://plasmascan.to/tx/0xa1c7498d44b98970871ac5e437a64820938b5b5ad8ca3a32a52d23df6a64d7fe

Staging
- 0x5430Ba7a62979b84B1894638c41776Ec7DC2EfE8 | 0.227 scudos ($1.00) | Jun 5, 09:17
  https://etherscan.io/tx/0x424b06075da787533c5fad5c833b6f9608c13859c70318e1c89c7ee9fc30b027

Need to figure out why these rants are not appearing in the chat.

Slack ref: https://tether-to.slack.com/archives/C094R63HQ64/p1780603661792139
